description_long: This is a modern, rectangular backpack with a structured silhouette and a deep navy blue color. The front features a large, subtly textured panel with a horizontal zipper pocket near the bottom and a vertical zipper pocket on the right side. The back is equipped with two wide, padded shoulder straps and a padded back panel for comfort, as well as a sturdy top handle for hand carrying. The left side has a padded, adjustable crossbody strap, while the right side is smooth and unadorned. The backpack appears to be made primarily of synthetic fabric, likely nylon or polyester, with reinforced stitching and minimalistic design elements. There are no visible brand logos or decorative embellishments, giving it a sleek, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A structured, navy blue backpack with padded straps, multiple zipper pockets, and a minimalist, modern design. It features a large front panel, reinforced handle, and no visible branding or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main panel, a horizontal zipper pocket at the bottom, and a vertical zipper pocket on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the padded, adjustable crossbody strap and the slim profile of the backpack.
description_view_2: Back view displaying two wide, padded shoulder straps and a padded back panel for ergonomic support.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a smooth, unadorned surface and the side profile of the main compartment.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, padded, adjustable shoulder straps and one padded, adjustable crossbody strap; all straps are black with no visible chest or waist strap.
attribute_zipper_placement: One horizontal zipper at the bottom front pocket, one vertical zipper on the right front side, and one zipper for the main compartment at the top.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One large main compartment, one horizontal front pocket, and one vertical front side pocket; no visible side or mesh pockets.
